//: Copy-paste detector — a HARD GATE in `npm run verify` (and the pre-commit hook). `threshold` is the max % of duplicated lines allowed; the build fails above it. Baseline at wiring was 2.82%, so 3 holds the line and blocks regressions. RATCHET IT DOWN as existing clones are paid off (see the heightfield→normal-map loop shared across the texture files). A deliberate, reviewed clone goes between `// jscpd:ignore-start` … `// jscpd:ignore-end` so it doesn't count.
